title: CobbleCuisine Delight
description: A datapack addon for CobbleCuisine that provides compatibility with the Farmer's Delight mod.
body:
This datapack adds Farmer's Delight style recipes, using the Cooking Pot, to make the food items from CobbleCuisine.

Use JEI to view the recipes. 

Credits to the original developers of Farmer's Delight and Farmer's Delight Refabricated.
